nodes.label: .`starts empty until a playlist is configured`()
.`markWatched orders recents newest-first, dedupes, caps at 8`()
.`loadXmltv persists guide and returns now next by channel id`()
.`loadXmltv rejects an empty guide without persisting`()
.`epg matches xmltv channel suffix and display name aliases`()
.`restore rebuilds epg alias matching from persisted guide channels`()
.`clearXmltv removes loaded guide and persisted url`()
